title: Variable not persisting after page navigation
symptom: After redirecting to another page, the variable intended to control modal visibility resets to FALSE, despite being set to TRUE in the workflow.
applies_when: Redirecting to another page in a workflow
root_cause: The current limitation in the workflow system prevents any actions, including variable changes, from being executed after a page change. This results in the variable not retaining its value across navigations.
fix_steps: Move the variable change action before the page navigation action in the workflow
If needed, create a second variable to manage modal state across pages
agent_instruction: Rearrange your workflow to change the variable before navigating to the new page.
